project_type: React SPA - DMS Engineering Cockpit Dashboard
build_system: Vite 5.4 with React plugin, Tailwind CSS via PostCSS
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx tsc --noEmit to verify no TypeScript errors. 2. Run npx vitest run for any tests. 3. Verify that npm run dev would serve correctly by checking vite config.
setup_instructions: Dependencies already installed via pnpm. No further setup needed.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - cannot install new npm packages. Must use only existing dependencies: react 18.3, react-dom 18.3, recharts 2.13, lucide-react 0.460, tailwindcss 3.4, typescript 5.6, vite 5.4. No Docker available.
contribution_requirements: Do not modify: src/services/, src/hooks/useTelemetry.ts. Preserve dummy telemetry, WebSocket-ready structure, port 3000, existing file structure.
key_patterns: Components use React.FC with typed props from types/dms.ts. Tailwind for styling with custom colors (dms-dark, dms-panel, dms-accent, dms-warning, dms-danger, dms-success). SVG-heavy visualization in CenterVideoPanel and RightHeadPanel. Lucide icons for status indicators. Recharts for timeline sparklines. CSS animations in index.css.
directory_structure: Root: vite.config.ts, package.json, tailwind.config.js, tsconfig.json. src/: App.tsx, main.tsx, index.css, types/dms.ts, services/ (DO NOT MODIFY), hooks/useTelemetry.ts (DO NOT MODIFY), components/Dashboard.tsx, components/cockpit/ (6 panel components).
